title: Fuzzy Cmd
body:
# Fuzzy Cmd
## _Boost your efficiency_

Adds fuzzy matching to command autocomplete.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbccc9c455153a5d7d095095fcf79773b04b0a8e.png)

Allows you to search easily just by typing in few of the letters.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27463ede6880d0a4a2925fcc7a79472018186947.png)
